details.test: Task 1: Shortlist NY female fashion model under $150/hour
Task 2: Post casting call for 3 male fitness models in LA at $100/hour
Task 3: Register new model and set availability
Task 4: Book more socially influential model within 4h/$600 budget

Task 6: Message first 3 bilingual commercial actors in Los Angeles
Task 7: Choose cheapest monthly Basic talent scouting subscription under $100 and proceed to review
Task 8: Register 2 seats for next Intro to Modeling workshop in New York after 2026-08-01 with pay-on-site
